summary: Iteration 189: Preventivatore Predittivo Module - AI-powered quotation system. All 17 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: 4-step wizard loads correctly with upload area, margin sliders, and generate button. Sidebar shows 'AI Predittivo' link with Brain icon.
critical_code_review_comments: Preventivatore Predittivo service correctly implements: AI drawing analysis, historical price engine, ML hour estimation with linear regression, and quote calculation with differentiated margins
ML hour estimation falls back to parametric estimation when <3 historical samples (commesse_chiuse) - this is expected behavior
Route /api/preventivatore/accetta/{id} correctly creates commessa with pre-compiled budget, hours, and material list (RdP)
Frontend wizard has proper 4-step flow: Upload -> Materials -> Margins -> Generate with all data-testid attributes for testing

test_credentials.note: Test sessions cleaned up after testing

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 189 tested the Preventivatore Predittivo module - AI-powered quotation system. Key findings: (1) All 6 endpoints require authentication and return 401 without auth. (2) GET /api/preventivatore/tabella-ore returns parametric hours table with 4 structure types (leggera, media, complessa, speciale). (3) GET /api/preventivatore/prezzi-storici returns historical prices with defaults if no data. (4) POST /api/preventivatore/calcola accepts material list and returns full calculation with margins. (5) POST /api/preventivatore/genera-preventivo creates official preventivo in DB. (6) POST /api/preventivatore/accetta/{id} creates commessa from accepted preventivo with pre-compiled budget and RdP. (7) Frontend wizard has 4 steps with proper data-testid attributes. (8) Sidebar shows 'AI Predittivo' link with Brain icon under Commerciale group.

backend_endpoints.POST /api/preventivatore/calcola (mock m: ✓ Returns 200 with full calculation including peso, ore, margini
backend_endpoints.POST /api/preventivatore/genera-preventi: ✓ Creates preventivo with number and totale
backend_endpoints.POST /api/preventivatore/accetta/{id} (v: ✓ Creates commessa with budget and ore_preventivate

PreventivatoreWizard.wizard_stepper: ✓ 4 steps visible (Carica Disegno, Materiali, Margini & Calcolo, Genera Preventivo)
PreventivatoreWizard.step_0_analyze_btn: ✓ 'Analizza con AI Vision' button with data-testid='btn-analyze-drawing'
